domain: Cherokee stomp dance (Cherokee + Chickasaw + other tribes; counter-clockwise circle around sacred fire; turtle-shell-pebble rattle shell-shakers carry rhythm; alternating male-female spiral; heart + left-hand toward fire; cannot start without shakers)
specific_mechanism: STOMP-RING-NULL-CCW: counter-clockwise ring-rotation null-space gradient subspace traversal + rhythm-anchored alignment preservation + spiral-inward annealed radius. (1) Maintain K orthogonal gradient subspaces {S_1, ..., S_K} arranged in ring (S_K connects to S_1). (2) Per training step t, project gradient onto S_{(t-1) mod K +1} — counter-clockwise step. (3) Rhythm-anchor: 'shell-shaker' alignment direction e_anchor fixed reference. (4) Heart-toward-fire constraint: every parameter update maintains cos-sim(θ, e_anchor) > τ — alignment-preservation. (5) Spiral inward: subspace radius ρ(t) decays monotonically — annealed-radius schedule for convergence toward fire-center. (6) Cannot start without shaker: e_anchor must be initialized before step 1.
llm_application: STOMP-RING-NULL-CCW K-subspace counter-clockwise ring traversal gradient projection + alignment-anchor preservation + spiral-inward annealed radius. Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT-NULL (weft tensor). R427 ULI-EPHEMERAL (ink). R441 BOGOLAN-FERMENT-NEG (negative-resist). R453 SLACK-TENSION-NULL (slack-tension). R469 ORTHO-LORA-TEAM (gradient norm). R478 SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL (secondal). Differs from Lotus 2602.01233 (adaptive subspace switching — closest, but no fixed CCW ring schedule + no rhythm-anchor). SubTrack++ 2502.01586 (Grassmannian — closest, no ring schedule). ReSpinQuant 2604.11080 (subspace rotation — quantization not training). TSR 2602.11767 (RL trajectory). Differs by FIXED CCW K-RING SCHEDULE + RHYTHM-ANCHOR ALIGNMENT PRESERVATION + SPIRAL-INWARD ANNEALED RADIUS.
novelty_claim: Lotus + SubTrack++ + ReSpinQuant + TSR cover gradient subspace traversal + adaptive switching paradigm. STOMP-RING-NULL-CCW adds (a) fixed CCW K-ring schedule + (b) rhythm-anchor alignment-direction preservation + (c) spiral-inward annealed radius. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: K-subspace counter-clockwise ring traversal gradient projection

llm_side: K-subspace counter-clockwise ring traversal gradient projection
